node.statement: AXIOM JB4 (approximate Jordan identity). By GT-jordan, ||((a•a)•b)•a - (a•a)•(b•a)|| <= C_4 sqrt(eta) ||a||^3 ||b|| for all a,b in A, with C_4 universal dimension-free. This delivers def-eps-jb-algebra (JB4) ||((a o a) o b) o a - (a o a) o (b o a)|| <= eps ||a||^3 ||b|| with the O(sqrt(eta)) defect C_4 sqrt(eta) (this is the dominant term setting eps; see node 1.7).
